sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka biak ahingkik Honpa tu’n leitungah om a,
Mite’n bangbang genta leh, Ahin lam ka
Hong hehpihna ka thei a, A aw ka zaza hi,
Amah ka kisap laitak hongnai den

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hing hi, hing hi, tuni’n Honpa hing hi,
Ka paina khempeuh ah, hing hi, hing hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka kiim ka paam leitung teng A hong itna
Lungman launa ka tuah ciang, A ang sung ka beel a;
Huihpi nun ciang A khut in kei hong len
Amah hong kilat ding ni, hong tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hallelujah ci unla, phat un Khris kumpipa;
Tua bang itna lian a nei mi om lo hi.
